title: Implement URL Shortener REST API in Go

steps.description: Define domain model for URL and implement value objects.
steps.done_condition: Domain model for URL is implemented and passes all tests.

steps.description: Define ports for creating and retrieving shortened URLs.
steps.done_condition: Ports for URL creation and retrieval are defined and pass all tests.

steps.description: Implement the in-memory storage adapter that conforms to the ports.
steps.done_condition: In-memory storage adapter is implemented and connected to the domain model, passing all tests.

steps.description: Implement HTTP handlers for processing URL creation and retrieval.
steps.done_condition: HTTP handlers for URL creation and retrieval are functional and pass all tests.

steps.description: Implement use cases to manage URL creation and retrieval logic.
steps.done_condition: Use cases for URL creation and retrieval are implemented and pass all tests.

steps.description: Wire up the composition root to connect all components.
steps.done_condition: Composition root is properly set up, allowing the application to run.

steps.description: Implement integration tests to validate the full URL shortening functionality.
steps.done_condition: All integration tests pass, validating the entire URL shortening feature.

mergeOrder: Then merge in-memory storage and HTTP handlers
successCriteria: All units and integration tests pass.
URL shortening feature works as expected.
